name: Global Neutral Reachability Governance
rational: A politically neutral baseline for global internet reachability. Validates only infrastructure and carrier nodes that are explicitly global (countries:[*]) — no country-specific nodes, no regional bias. Intended as an objective reference point independent of geopolitical context.
controls: Only nodes with countries:[*] are included — no country-specific scope
Infrastructure, carrier and platform domains only
No government, finance, media or energy nodes — avoids political interpretation
Reachability measured from browser context without regional assumption
requirements: REQ-IOF-GLB-001: Core DNS and CDN infrastructure reachability
REQ-IOF-GLB-002: Global carrier tier-1 presence validation
REQ-IOF-GLB-003: Developer platform availability (package registries, VCS)

description.purpose: Neutral global baseline — infrastructure, carrier, platform. No geopolitical scope.
